what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment: an image added to the design-assets channel, referencing a target image URI and a timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
Attachment ID att-9f095204, channel design-assets, attachment_type images.
Target is image://design-assets/icons/image (50), with a parenthetical quantity or size indicator.
standouts: The target URI embeds a parenthetical '(50)' whose meaning is not defined in the file.
It is a pure metadata ledger entry with no code or design payload.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with an 'added' ISO-8601 timestamp.
Follows a channel-attachment naming scheme att-<uuid>.md.
References an external image asset via a custom image:// URI scheme.
concerns: The '(50)' in the target field is unexplained (count? size? version?).
No title, caption, or alt text for the image attachment is recorded.
The file does not state who added the attachment or why.
notes: A timestamped ledger stub that registers one image attachment in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the '(50)' in the target URI represent?
Is the target URI resolvable, and where is the actual image stored?
Who or what process created this attachment entry?
purpose_vs_actual: The file has no explicit stated purpose beyond its schema, and its content matches the expected role of a channel-attachment ledger record.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record that a specific image asset was attached to the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target URI includes a parenthetical quantity that is not a standard URI component, suggesting an application-specific convention.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped evidence record of an image attachment in the design-assets channel, including a unique attachment ID and a reference to the attached image resource.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger file named att-9f095204.md that records an image attachment added to the design-assets channel, referencing image://design-assets/icons/image (50) with a 2026 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To log the addition of a specific image asset to the design-assets channel for later retrieval or provenance tracking.
